name: Reminder
description: Schedule time-based reminders with TTS alerts and WebUI notifications. Supports natural language and recurring CRON expressions.

commands.set_reminder: Creates a reminder. Fires TTS + WebUI alert at the specified time.
commands.list_reminders: Lists all active reminders with their scheduled time and ID.
commands.cancel_reminder: Cancels an active reminder by ID.
commands.snooze_reminder: Postpones a reminder by N minutes from now.

function.name: REMINDER__set_reminder
function.description: Creates a new reminder that fires a voice alert and WebUI notification at the specified time. Supports natural language ('tomorrow at 15:00', 'in 20 minutes', 'ogni lunedì alle 9') and CRON-style recurrence ('every Monday at 9:00', 'ogni giorno alle 8'). Always use this when the user says 'remind me', 'ricordami', 'svegliami', 'imposta un promemoria'.

title.description: What to remind the user about. Be concise and descriptive (e.g. 'Call the doctor', 'Check the oven', 'Daily standup').

when.description: When to fire the reminder. Accepts natural language: 'domani alle 15:00', 'tra 20 minuti', 'every Monday at 9:00', 'ogni giorno alle 8', 'next Friday at 18:30'. For one-shot reminders use a specific time; for recurring use patterns like 'ogni lunedì', 'every morning', 'ogni giorno'.

repeat.description: Optional: explicit CRON expression (5 fields: min hour day month day_of_week) for advanced recurring schedules. Example: '0 9 * * 1' for every Monday at 9:00. Leave empty and use `when` for natural language recurrence.

function.name: REMINDER__list_reminders
function.description: Returns a formatted list of all active reminders (title, scheduled time, ID). Use this when the user asks 'what reminders do I have?', 'mostrami i promemoria', 'lista promemoria'.

function.name: REMINDER__cancel_reminder
function.description: Cancels an active reminder. The reminder_id can be the full UUID or the first 8 characters shown in list_reminders. Use this when the user says 'cancel reminder', 'cancella promemoria', 'elimina promemoria'.

reminder_id.description: The full ID or first 8 characters of the reminder ID (as shown in list_reminders).

function.name: REMINDER__snooze_reminder
function.description: Postpones a reminder by a specified number of minutes from the current time. Use when the user says 'snooze', 'posticipa', 'rimandalo di X minuti'.

reminder_id.description: The full ID or first 8 characters of the reminder to snooze.

minutes.description: How many minutes to postpone the reminder. Default: 15.
